arts.ttl: Preview: Sheffield United vs. Preston North End - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Sheffield United and Preston North End, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Preston v Villa and Brighton-Forest FA Cup ties on BBC
arts.sum: The BBC will show the FA Cup quarter-final between Preston - the only club outside the top flight left in the competition - against Aston Villa.
